Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
David Kestenbaum, Esq.415-344-9670 of Gratefeld Hoffmann, for INTERVENOR STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

INTERVENOR STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention.

Proposed Intervenor State Farm General Insurance Company's motion for leave to file complaint in intervention is granted. No opposition filed.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Complaint In Intervention
Off Calendar Aug-01-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Proposed Intervenor State Farm General Insurance Company's motion for leave to file complaint in intervention is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled on proper notice. The motion did not provide the notice required by CCP 1005. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
